3260090.name: Burger Station
3260090.description:
The Burger Station exists far in the midst of nowhere. Burgers and fries are the attraction to those customers that come and go. It is also the home to the trees of the night.

The world is seen through a hungry lens

It's Halloween Night and nobody is really celebrating the Halloween Spirit! A tiny ghost-costume wearing child arrives to the burger spot in search for candy. Will they achieve their goal of literally getting a single piece of candy or will they meet the demise of the unknown?

Experience the spooks

-Explore the minimalistic void of the outskirts.

-Interact with random objects to understand and question the bizarre land.

-Look for keys and get lost around the silent trees.

Some treats in the candy bag

-Customize Borders.

-Tiny cutscenes.

-Fully voiced dialogue  (Text-to-Speech for the cinematic experience)

-Collect Golden Pumpkins to unlock a secret ending!

Controls:

WASD - Move

Spacebar - Interact/Confirm

Esc - Pause Game
3260090.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
